claim_boundaries: This is an exploratory audit of seven previously observed conflicts, not a confirmatory test.
Reference recovery is evidence of behavioral accessibility, not subjective awareness.
Failure to recover does not prove that the model never encoded the relation.
The catalog-supported reference is not asserted to be the only real-world artist for a title.
No hidden-state, circuit, intervention, prevalence, or self-correction claim is permitted.
This audit cannot reopen the stopped Phase 2 H1 or H2 analyses.
downstream_rule: Only reference_recoverable conflicts may be treated as candidate known-relation errors in the next mechanistic discovery stage; all other conflicts remain catalog mismatches without a latent-knowledge claim.
